title: voacanga grandifolia
intro: Voacanga grandifolia, also known as the "Voacanga tree" or "Tavi," is a tropical evergreen tree native to West Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a unique combination of indole alkaloids, including voacangine and voacristine. The medicinal properties of Voacanga grandifolia include anti-inflammatory, anxiolytic, and sedative effects, which can provide relief from anxiety, insomnia, and stress-related disorders. Herbal preparations of Voacanga grandifolia, such as tinctures and capsules, are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety.
